modules.name: Inventory
modules.description: What food is currently in the fridge/pantry, including expiry.

functions.name: CheckAvailability
functions.description: Checks which of the given ingredients are available in sufficient quantity; returns available vs missing.

functions.name: ConsumeItem
functions.description: Marks a quantity of an item as used/consumed (e.g. after a planned dinner). Reversible bookkeeping.

functions.name: GetExpiringItems
functions.description: Lists items that will expire within the given number of days from today — prime candidates for waste-rescue meals.

functions.name: ListItems
functions.description: Lists every item currently in the fridge/pantry with quantity, unit, category and expiry date.

modules.name: Calendar
modules.description: The shared family calendar — who is busy when.

functions.name: AddEvent
functions.description: Adds an event to the family calendar (e.g. 'dinner prep' block or the guest dinner itself).

functions.name: GetBusyEvenings
functions.description: Lists evenings in the window where someone is busy around dinnertime — nights that need quick-prep meals.

functions.name: GetEvents
functions.description: Lists calendar events between two ISO dates (inclusive), with attendee and start/end times.

modules.name: Recipes
modules.description: Recipe search and details: ingredients, allergen tags, prep time.

functions.name: FindRecipes
functions.description: Finds recipes, optionally filtered by tags to prefer (e.g. more_protein, quick_prep) and ingredients/allergens to exclude.

functions.name: GetRecipe
functions.description: Returns one recipe in full: ingredients, allergen 'contains' list, tags, prep minutes.

modules.name: ShoppingList
modules.description: The family shopping list and grocery ordering.

functions.name: Add
functions.description: Adds items to the shopping list. Reversible; requires light (batched) approval.

functions.name: GetList
functions.description: Returns the current shopping list.

functions.name: PlaceOrder
functions.description: Places the grocery order for the current list — SPENDS MONEY. Requires firm approval; blocked by safety if the estimate exceeds the budget cap.

functions.name: Remove
functions.description: Removes items from the shopping list.

modules.name: Reminders
modules.description: Family reminders and notes shown on the Hub.

functions.name: Create
functions.description: Creates a reminder (e.g. 'defrost the paneer tonight'). Cheap and reversible — auto tier.

functions.name: Delete
functions.description: Deletes a reminder by id.

functions.name: List
functions.description: Lists all active reminders with their due date/time.

modules.name: Guests
modules.description: Guest dinner event, RSVPs, and dietary constraints.

functions.name: GetDietaryConstraints
functions.description: Returns merged hard dietary constraints across attending guests, including allergies and no-beef/no-pork constraints.

functions.name: GetEvent
functions.description: Returns the upcoming hosted dinner event with resolved date, headcount, style, and timing.

functions.name: GetGuests
functions.description: Returns the guest list with RSVP status and dietary constraints.

modules.name: Appliance
modules.description: Controls SmartThings appliances: oven, dishwasher, vacuum, lights.

functions.name: Defrost
functions.description: Moves an item to the fridge's defrost/thaw workflow (e.g. 'defrost the paneer tonight').

functions.name: ListAppliances
functions.description: Lists the appliances SmartThings can reach and their current state.

functions.name: PreheatOven
functions.description: Schedules the oven to preheat to a temperature at a time. Checked against quiet hours and unattended-use rules.

functions.name: RunProgram
functions.description: Runs an appliance program at a time (e.g. dishwasher eco cycle, vacuum the kitchen).

modules.name: FamilyProfiles
modules.description: Family member profiles: diets, dislikes, ages — who lives here.

functions.name: GetMember
functions.description: Returns one member's dietary preferences, dislikes, age and notes.

functions.name: GetProfiles
functions.description: Lists family members with their dietary preferences, dislikes and ages.

modules.name: Budget
modules.description: Grocery/household budget status and cost estimation.

functions.name: EstimateCost
functions.description: Estimates the total cost of a set of items using the household price book. Unknown items are priced at the default.

functions.name: GetBudgetStatus
functions.description: Returns the budget period, cap, amount spent so far, and remaining headroom.

modules.name: Notify
modules.description: Sends notifications to family members or announces on the Hub.

functions.name: Announce
functions.description: Announces a message on the Hub / all household devices at a time. Blocked during quiet hours.

functions.name: SendNotification
functions.description: Sends a notification to one family member's phone (e.g. a party invitation, a reminder).

modules.name: Security
modules.description: Home security: lock doors, arm cameras and the alarm, check the security posture.

functions.name: ArmSecurity
functions.description: Arms the alarm and cameras in the given mode (e.g. "away"). Requires the cameras to be operational.

functions.name: GetSecurityStatus
functions.description: Returns the current security posture: which doors are locked, which cameras are armed, and the alarm state.

functions.name: LockAllDoors
functions.description: Locks every exterior door. Safe and reversible — auto tier.

modules.name: Grounding
modules.description: world-state context assembler for the planner

modules.name: Scheduler
modules.description: generic clock + temporal sequencing (real or simulated)

domains.hint: planning a child's birthday party — guest list, invitations, cake and decorations within budget, schedule
hosting a dinner for guests — menu, prep timeline, dietary constraints, RSVPs
planning the week's dinners — healthy eating, using up what is in the fridge
getting the home ready while the family is away — locking up, arming security, saving energy, pausing deliveries
